testcase.name: runScenario

error.message: element click intercepted: Element <button id="submit-login" name="submit-login" type="submit" class="btn btn-bg btn-primary d-block w-100">...</button> is not clickable at point (722, 678). Other element would receive the click: <iframe id="aswift_8" name="aswift_8" style="min-height: auto; max-height: none; min-width: auto; max-width: none; width: 728px !important; height: 90px !important; display: block; margin: 0px auto;" sandbox="allow-forms allow-popups allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox allow-same-origin allow-scripts allow-top-navigation-by-user-activation" width="728" height="90" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" vspace="0" hspace="0" allowtransparency="true" scrolling="no" allow="attribution-reporting; testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:67) at steps.LoginSteps.user_navigate_to_homepage(LoginSteps.java:58) at ✽.user navigate to homepage(file:///C:/Users/aj/JAVA_Project/cucumber-testng-project/cucumber-testng/src/test/resources/features/login.feature:11)
